title: Spacemacs.aDNA Telemetry Schema
description: JSON Schema for all telemetry submission classes. Ratified by ADR-009. Privacy class annotated per field: ANON=no operator-linkable data; PSEUDO=hash or enum (linkable only with a key); IDENT=never permitted in telemetry.

friction_signal.title: friction_signal
friction_signal.description: A friction event detected by skill_self_improve. Default-on if telemetry enabled.

detected_via_rule.description: [ANON] Which skill_self_improve detection rule fired. Rules are alphabetic labels with no operator-specific information.

signal_class.description: [ANON] Category of friction. Enum values carry no operator identity.

signal_count.description: [ANON] Number of times this signal was observed in recent sessions.

spacemacs_sha.description: [ANON] 40-character lowercase hex SHA of operator's pinned Spacemacs commit. No repo URL prefix. Pre-public commit SHAs are inherently non-identifying.

emacs_version.description: [ANON] GNU Emacs version string (e.g. '29.4'). No build metadata.

os.description: [ANON] Operating system family. Three-value enum; no sub-version leaks.

layer_set_hash.description: [PSEUDO] 16-hex-char truncated SHA-256 of sorted layer filenames only (not content or paths). Allows correlation across operators with similar configs without exposing file content. Sanitization rule: hash MUST be computed from filenames only — see telemetry.md § Telemetry-specific sanitization extensions.

adr_proposal.title: adr_proposal
adr_proposal.description: An operator-accepted or operator-rejected ADR drafted by skill_self_improve. Default-on if telemetry enabled.

adr_id_local.description: [PSEUDO] Local ADR ID (e.g. 'adr_009_telemetry_schema_lock_in'). The numeric portion may correlate across multiple submissions from the same operator. Slug is operator-chosen text — sanitization mandatory (no paths, hostnames, or PII).

title.description: [PSEUDO] Short ADR title. Operator-authored — sanitization mandatory before submission. No file paths, hostnames, or personal names.

proposed_by.description: [ANON] Whether the ADR was drafted by the self-improve agent or manually authored by the operator.

detection_evidence.description: [PSEUDO] One-sentence anonymized description of the friction that triggered this ADR. No file paths, hostnames, or operator-specific identifiers. Enforced by telemetry.md § sanitization extensions rule DE-1.

diff_summary.description: [ANON] Numeric summary of the ADR's patch. No file names or content.

operator_decision.description: [ANON] What the operator decided about this ADR.

customization_share.title: customization_share
customization_share.description: A voluntarily shared customization. Default-OFF — requires explicit opt-in beyond master consent switch.

target.description: [ANON] Which customization surface this share covers.

content_hash.description: [PSEUDO] 12-hex-char salted+truncated SHA-256 of the customization content. Salt is operator-local (not submitted). Truncation prevents rainbow-table reversal. Allows de-duplication at the fleet level without exposing content. See telemetry.md § sanitization extensions rule CS-1.

content_summary.description: [PSEUDO] One-line operator-authored description of the customization. No file paths, hostnames, or personal names. Sanitization mandatory.

operator_motivation.description: [PSEUDO] Optional. Why the operator made this customization. No file paths, hostnames, or personal names. Sanitization mandatory.

perf_metric.title: perf_metric
perf_metric.description: Startup and runtime performance measurements. Default-OFF — requires explicit opt-in beyond master consent switch.

boot_time_ms.description: [ANON] Wall-clock milliseconds from Emacs launch to ready prompt.

gcs_during_boot.description: [ANON] Number of garbage collections during startup.

emacs_memory_mb.description: [ANON] Emacs process RSS in megabytes after startup.

spacemacs_sha.description: [ANON] 40-character lowercase hex SHA of pinned Spacemacs commit. No repo URL.
